notes: Success JSON is {"added": ids} with ids := make([]string, len(tasks)) — always [] never null. Error paths use correct exit codes (ExitUsage=2 for invalid JSON with decoder detail routed to hint field per §6.1 rule 7 lines 64/112; ExitValidation=1 for dup id/blank fields lines 214-218; ExitFile=3 for IO). Hints present and actionable on every validation error (lines 215, 220).

TestAdd_NormalizesSlicesToEmptyOnWrite (229) + TestImport variant (247) assert depends_on/source_sections/tags serialize as [] not null/omitted. StructuredElementsEmptyAreArrayNotNull (265) and Stats_TagsEmptyIsArrayNotNull (292) cover lint/stats. errJSON helper (37) confirms error shape {code,error,hint}. Exit codes 1/2 asserted per case.

auditResult struct (54-62) carries spec/files/file_summary/checklist/checklist_summary/skipped_roles/prompts. skipped_roles forced to &[]SkippedRole{} under non-compact (237-239) so it is [] not null; omitted under compact per §8.4 (236). exitAuditNoFiles (747-752) emits suggested_files (decision-critical, survives compact — error path bypasses compactAuditChecklist) with actionable hint on exit 4. Malformed auditor aborts exit 3 (192) with repair hint.

TestAuditSuggestedFilesFromCommitSHAs (90) verifies exit 4 + suggested_files shape + hint naming --affected-files/--affected-from-tasks. TestAuditSuggestedFilesEmpty (111) asserts [] (not null) array type. TestAuditSuggestedFilesSurvivesCompact (149) confirms decision-critical survival under --compact. Conflict tests (199-213) verify exit 2 usage errors.

Summary map (74-81): merged_count/input_files/duplicates_removed/by_status/by_role/findings — all scalar or map (Go JSON sorts map keys → deterministic). overlap_report omitted under compact (85-87) per §8.4; decision-critical counts survive. dedupAuditRows (170-194) uses sort.SliceStable by (role,item_id) → deterministic, not map order. rows/unique initialized make([]…,0) → [] not null. Exit codes: 2 (no files/spec positional 20-37), 3 (missing file 118-129).

TestAuditMerge_DedupAndStatusSummary (17) verifies merged_count/duplicates_removed/findings/by_status shapes and exact dedup. EmptyInputSucceeds (59) + OnlyMalformedSucceeds (81) confirm exit 0 + zero-byte -o for clean/empty inputs per §3.3 rows 2-3. NoInputFilesExit2 (107) + MissingFileExit3 (116) + RejectsSpecPositionalExit2 (128) cover exit codes 2/3 with actionable stderr.

latestAuditRoundOverlapReport returns []engine.RoleOverlap{} (not nil) on all early-exit paths (45,49,53). computeAuditOverlapReport (16-38) clusters deterministically via order slice preserving first-occurrence; roleSets := make([][]string, 0, len(order)) → [] not null. Pure computation delegated to engine.OverlapReport; no direct JSON/exit-code surface — correct separation.

TestAuditPrompts_BodyOrderAndEmbedding (13) asserts §3.1 section order role<rules<excerpt<checklist<files<schema, checklist embedded as JSON array with item_id+expected_evidence (never empty). §3.4 routing verified: spec excerpt only in spec-coverage, CLAUDE.md Project Context only in maintainability. DeterministicRegeneration (69) confirms byte-identical output across runs — no map-iteration nondeterminism.

runAuditStatus (168-202): audit_rounds initialized []engine.ReviewRound{} (161) → [] not null. max_rounds/rounds_remaining explicitly nil when uncapped (193-194), integer when capped (185,190) per §10.1. budget_exhausted only when capped (191). in_flight_round explicit nil when none (201) per §10.2. overlap_report omitted under compact (178). runAuditRecord output (74-82) all scalar fields. Exit codes 3/1 correct.

buildRolePrompt (119-167) renders §3.1 body order deterministically with compact JSON checklist embedding. routeChecklist (31-57) and generateRoleAuditPrompts (173-198) initialize all return slices with make([]T, 0, …) → [] not null. sort.SliceStable on structural items (41) + sort.Strings on task files (112) → deterministic. SkippedRole carries {Role,Reason} shape (192). No token bloat: prompt is concise, no redundant fields.

readBulkTasks checks scanner.Err() (L121); addTasks wraps all reads+writes in engine.WithFileLock (L186); errors exit+propagate; no nil-slice null risk (model.WriteTaskFile normalizes); ResolveWorkflow/ParseHeadings best-effort drops are documented.
errJSON/readRawTaskFile use require.NoError; TestAdd_NormalizesSlicesToEmptyOnWrite asserts [] not null for depends_on/source_sections/tags; exit codes asserted; no swallowed errors.

execGitDiff (L477) and readFindings (L661) both check scanner.Err(); loadAuditSpec writes phase-scoped snapshot via WriteSnapshotAtomic(PhaseAudit) (L312); optional task-file drops (taskAcceptanceEntries L565-568) are documented best-effort; latestGitTag/gitExists errors are intentional control flow.
gitOut/commitFile use require.NoError; exit-code 4 + suggested_files=[] contract asserted; toStringSlice uses safe type assertion with ok-check; no swallowed errors in test helpers.

os.WriteFile uses 0o600 (L90); loadAuditMergeRows checks scanner.Err() (L159); json.Marshal error warned+dropped with reason (L48); defer f.Close() is idiomatic read-only (data buffered into scanner) — golangci-lint clean; type-assert _ ok pattern defaults safely.
dedup counting, empty/malformed input exit 0, missing file exit 3, no-input exit 2 all asserted; require.NoError throughout; no swallowed errors.
Pure map/slice computation, no I/O or writes; latestAuditRoundOverlapReport delegates to parseNDJSONFile which returns scanner.Err() (review_report.go:191); error→empty is documented (L42).
Body order, checklist embedding, excerpt scoping, and deterministic regeneration verified; require.NoError/assert throughout; type assertions in tests fail loudly (idiomatic).

recordAuditRoundEntry wraps round-file write + state-index append in engine.WithReviewStateLock (L91); os.WriteFile 0o600 (L99); SpecHash/LoadReviewState/EnsureReviewState errors all propagate to exit; ComputeRolesHash _ is best-effort with empty-string default (documented §9.2); ResolveWorkflow _ uses safe zero-value defaults.

No task-file writes (pure prompt generation); filepath.Join/Dir/Ext throughout; claudeMDExcerptFor optional read documented (L214 continue); json.Marshal(ChecklistItem) _ is known-safe struct (strings/ints only); auditDiffStats/auditDeletedFiles/auditTasksOf errors are intentional empty-sentinel for optional git/task-file state.

JSON-bound 'added' slice is make([]string,len)@265; var tasks@100 is a guarded accumulator (len==0 early-return@163) that never serializes null; %v in output.Error is terminal display not propagation; decodeTaskJSON propagates bare but caller adds context via hint; addTasks spans ~113 body lines as a single cohesive locked-write closure (near cobra-handler tolerance, well-sectioned); no TODO/dead code.

Tests directly assert [] not null for depends_on/source_sections/tags (229-263) and stats.tags@292; all helper funcs/constants documented (entryValidationSpec@14, initEntryProject@23, validEntryTask@33, errJSON@36, readRawTaskFile@220, extractSlice@283); slices make-initialized (got@177); no JSON-bound bare var slices.

All JSON-bound slices are make([]T,0): checklist@507, filtered@413, entries@581/602; byType map@214; ChecklistItem exported+documented@35; bare var accumulators (allFiles@387, files@469, results@637) are converted to make-slices or closures before serialization; os.Stat err@362 intentionally transformed to friendly message; no TODO/dead code; runAudit ~97 lines (<110).

All slices make-initialized (parts@59, toStringSlice out@70); task file written with tasks:[]@51; helpers documented (gitOut@16, commitFile@27, writeTaskFileRaw@36, newAuditRepo@44, doneTaskJSON@56, closeTaskFile@79); tests assert suggested_files [] vs null parity (111-123, 182-194); no TODO/dead code.

JSON-bound rows@124 and unique@172 are make([]map,0); missing@146 is display-only (never serialized); byStatus/byRole maps@57-58 initialized; dedupAuditRows returns initialized slice; all 3 funcs documented (14,111,167); runAuditMerge ~90 lines (orchestration <110); write-file err@91 consumed in display; no TODO/dead code.

Every test documented (14,56,77,105,114,123); assertions verify merged_count/duplicates_removed/findings and []-via-counts semantics covering §3.3 rows; no JSON-output-bound bare var slices (count@47 is int); helpers used; no TODO/dead code.

Exemplary null-slice discipline: every empty return path uses explicit []engine.RoleOverlap{} (45,49,53) and make for accumulators (order@22, roleSets@33); both funcs documented (computeAuditOverlapReport@9, latestAuditRoundOverlapReport@40); file is 56 lines; no TODO/dead code.

ids@86 make([]string,0); findItemEvidence@96 used@93; deterministic-regeneration test covers id stability; no JSON-bound bare var slices; minor: the two Test funcs lack the per-test doc comments used elsewhere in the package (unexported, self-explanatory by name/assertions) — not a rule violation.

%w wrapping used correctly at countAuditFindings@128 (fmt.Errorf line %d: invalid JSON: %w); all JSON-bound slices are []engine.ReviewRound{} literals (preRounds@34, rounds@161); all 4 funcs documented (15,85,116,138); runAuditStatus 72 lines (<80); no TODO/dead code.

All JSON-bound slices make([]T,0): spec@43, items@89, prompts@174, candidates@205; role-name constants documented@17 and all 12 funcs documented; exec git err paths checked+continue (not propagated); invertTaskFiles inner slices built via append then sorted (read via range/len, not serialized); no TODO/dead code.
loadMergeFindings returns [] on all-empty/all-invalid inputs without failing; runReviewMerge writes empty -o and reports merged_count 0 (exit 0). The merge→record chain now works on a clean round.
runCommit stages the wip task file with impl files (C1), records commit_sha=C1, then foldClosureCommit amends (guarded) or follow-up commits so tp-owned state lands committed and git status is clean.

addTasks calls engine.ValidateTaskEntry per task (rules 1,3-6) and checks duplicate id incrementally (rule 2); invalid JSON rejected at decode (rule 7). io.go WriteTaskFile L77-91 normalizes nil slices to [] so no null leaks.

The goal state (clean round) is a first-class path: empty inputs succeed (§3.1); the close-checkpoint path leaves a clean tree (commit.go foldClosureCommit). Both are tested happy paths, not error edges.
foldClosureCommit (amend or follow-up) leaves git status clean for tp-owned paths; close_checkpoint_test.go:47-68 asserts the task file is folded, not left dirty.
ValidateTaskEntry rejects at add time (missing/blank id, title, acceptance, no anchor, unknown deps); add.go:219-222 exits 1. tp validate reports drift, not entry damage tp allowed in.
skipped_roles names every non-emitted role (audit.go:236-241); attribution_excludes surfaces the regression exclusion conditionally (review_overlap.go:69-84); overlap_report present on merge/status.
Exit codes 0/1/2/3/4 are a fixed contract; usage_error.go:27-31 wraps cobra flag-parse failures into the tp error object at exit 2 rather than bare cobra exit 1.
New fields (bookkeeping, suggested_files, max_rounds/rounds_remaining/in_flight_round) survive --compact as decision-critical signals; explanatory fields drop. Each replaces an agent inspection.
No new lifecycle phase: exitcodes unchanged (0/1/2/3/4); resume.go DetectPhase uses the existing phases. Convergence criteria (Converged, clean-round counting) unchanged.

No runtime-specific behavior in tp code: the implement-phase guidance is a generic one-liner ('run each task in a fresh subagent/context'). Runtime setup guidance lives in SKILL.md:165-167, not in code.
resolveUsageForm states '0-based index'; non-numeric index → exit 2 naming the expected form (L59-67), not an 'invalid status' error. Indices stay 0-based, documented not renumbered.
tp commit under commit_strategy hc → ExitUsage(2) 'tp commit is not valid under commit_strategy hc'. No hc exec anywhere; done --auto-commit is the only tp-made commit path and it refuses under hc.
--merge all-empty exits 0 + empty -o (L78-86); missing input exits 3 (L118-121); no input exits 2 (L16-20). audit_merge_test.go:59-75 + review_merge_test.go cover all three.

skipped_roles lists non-emitted roles with reason (skipped.go:26-29: no-checklist-items/no-spec-change/domain-mismatch/no-baseline); merge/status add attribution_excludes=['regression'] only when it changed merged_count vs overlap count.

tp audit --merge emits overlap_report (audit_merge.go:85-87, omitted under --compact); --status via latestAuditRoundOverlapReport (audit_overlap.go:43-56). Clusters non-PASS rows by (item_id, category).
max_rounds (null uncapped), rounds_remaining, budget_exhausted (L75-86); in_flight_round from InFlightRound (L89-93); resume next_action=record-round N when a snapshot exists without its round file.

exitAuditNoFiles (L747-753) emits suggested_files from suggestFilesFromTasks (union of done-task commit_shas paths, type-filtered) + hint; --affected-from-tasks (determineAuditFiles:255-264) audits that set directly.

WithFileLockTimeout retries TryLock with exponential backoff until timeout; lock_test.go:46-82 (concurrent retries succeed), 84-113 (held past timeout → *LockTimeoutError with LockPath+Elapsed, mapped to exit 4).

Each §13.1 case returns exit 2 + hint: invalid-JSON add (decoder in hint), cobra flag-parse (usage_error.go), dash-leading reason (usage_error.go:48-53). exitcode_conformance_test.go covers the matrix.

roundedActual=roundTo(actualMin,1); if 0 → Accuracy nil + Note 'duration below resolution' + excluded++; summary ExcludedFromAccuracy counts them and EstimationAccuracy excludes them (L162-178). Note niled under --compact (L69-73).

CheckEmptySections skips a heading whose next heading is deeper (L36-38: headings[i+1].Level > h.Level → container, continue); still fires empty-section on an empty leaf. lint_test.go:58-103 covers both.

set_project writes commit_strategy to .tp/config.json (L45-54, validated builtin/auto/hc); config.go:60 resolvedConfig annotates commit_strategy source; set.go:319-321 task-level exits 2 naming the project setter.

go test ./... exit 0 (10.9s cli, fresh -count=1); golangci-lint 0 issues. README.md documents affected-from-tasks/bookkeeping/in_flight_round/lock_timeout/attribution_excludes; SKILL.md:165-167 covers non-Claude runtime driving; skills/tp/REFERENCE.md exists.
A clean round produces an empty file via --merge (exit 0), then --record counts it as clean (review_record.go). No manual file creation needed. review_merge_test.go exercises the full chain.

tp audit <spec> --merge a b: isSpecLookingPath rejects the .md positional → exit 2. tp review <spec> --resolve f 0: isSpecLookingPath on the findings positional → exit 2 naming the form (review_resolve.go:48-55).

done --auto-commit: writes wip+impl (C1), gitCommit, sets done+commit_sha=C1, foldClosureCommit. close_checkpoint_test.go:47-68 (commit folds), 74-94 (done --auto-commit folds) assert clean tree + status done + C1 recorded; canAmendClosure fallback when HEAD moved.

DeriveBookkeeping classifies the dirty task file as closure (ref=task id), .tp-review as round, .tp as config — separate from changes. resume_bookkeeping_test.go:42-58 asserts no unexplained-changes blocker for the task file.

LockFilePath places the lock under .tp/locks/; WithFileLockTimeout removes a stale sibling (L63-67) and the lock itself on release (L93-96). commit.go:202-204 refuses --files ending .tasks.json.lock. lock_test.go:115-134.

Each §6.1 rule rejected at entry with exit 1 (or 2 for invalid JSON) + hint; io.go:77-91 normalizes nil→[] for depends_on/source_sections/tags; structured.go:201-204 initializes Tables/NumberedLists as []; stats tags [] (add_validation_test.go:292-304).
addTasks calls engine.AutoFillCoverage when the spec is readable (L255-257); AutoFillCoverage no-ops on unreadable spec (coverage.go:14-16). init+add+validate is clean with no import round trip.

ExtractSpecExcerptForTask: source_lines drives when present, else extractSectionsExcerpt assembles heading+body to next same/shallower heading, listed order, blank-line-joined, capped 2000 chars. plan/show/next/peek all call it.
Findings present: NDJSON written to -o or stdout, summary merged_count = len(unique) > 0; clusterMergeFindings dedups and sorts. Exit 0.
All-empty inputs: loadMergeFindings returns []; os.WriteFile creates a zero-byte -o file; summary merged_count=0. Verified by audit_merge_test.go:59-75 (TestAuditMerge_EmptyInputSucceeds).
Malformed (invalid JSON) and incomplete (missing location/severity/finding) lines skipped with stderr warnings naming which; empty -o created, merged_count 0, exit 0. Test audit_merge_test.go:81-103.
Missing file: os.IsNotExist → ExitFile(3); unreadable: os.Open err → ExitFile(3). Output file not written (abort before WriteFile). Error object emitted.
Input paths given but none readable: len(args)>0 passes the L16 guard, then loadMergeFindings exits 3 on the first missing/unreadable file. Not written, error object.
len(args)==0 → ExitUsage(2) 'at least 1 file required for merge'. Output file not written, error object.
TrimSpace(task.ID)=='' → EntryFinding id-blank, hint 'provide a non-blank id field'; add.go:219-222 exits 1 (ExitValidation). Catches whitespace-only.
existing[t.ID] check (file ids + intra-batch) → ExitValidation(1), hint 'a task with id X already exists; use tp set to update it'. Names the existing task.
TrimSpace(task.Title)=='' → title-blank, hint 'provide a non-blank title field', exit 1.
TrimSpace(task.Acceptance)=='' → acceptance-blank, hint 'provide a non-blank acceptance field', exit 1.
len(SourceSections)==0 && TrimSpace(SourceLines)=='' → source-anchor, hint names both anchors ('source_sections' or 'source_lines'), exit 1.
Depends_on ids not in resolvable set (file ids + batch ids) → unknown-dependency, hint lists unknown ids, exit 1.
json.Unmarshal failure → ExitUsage(2), error 'invalid task JSON', decoder detail in hint (err.Error()). Test add_validation_test.go:128-138 confirms decoder in hint not error.
tp add '{not valid json' → exit 2 (ExitUsage), error='invalid task JSON', hint carries decoder detail. Matches the v0.29.0 conformance (was exit 3 raw decoder in error).

wrapFlagErrors installs a FlagErrorFunc wrapping errors as flagUsageError; usageErrorDetail:45-55 shapes into tp {error,code,hint} at exit 2, not bare cobra exit 1. exitcode_conformance_test.go covers it.
For reasonCommands (done/close/commit), dashLeadingPositional detects a '-'-prefixed positional; hint='separate positionals from flags with --: <cmd> <id> -- <reason>', exit 2.

suggestFilesFromTasks (L713-739): union of paths from every done-task commit_shas, type-filtered, [] when none; exitAuditNoFiles (L747-753) exit 4 + suggested_files + hint; --affected-from-tasks (determineAuditFiles:255-264) audits derived set. suggested_files survives --compact.

Stage wip task file + impl → C1; SetCommitSHAs([C1]); write closure; foldClosureCommit (canAmendClosure guards HEAD==C1 + dirty⊆written, else followUpClosureCommit 'chore(tp): record <id> closure'). done.go:245-305 same path. suggested_files reads C1 diff (audit.go:705 execCommitFiles).

set_project writes commit_strategy to .tp/config.json workflow block (validated builtin/auto/hc); config.go:55-60 resolvedConfig annotates commit_strategy with {value,source}; set.go:319-321 task-level commit_strategy → exit 2 naming the project setter.

addTasks calls AutoFillCoverage when specExists (L255-257); AutoFillCoverage no-ops on unreadable spec (coverage.go:14-16: returns on err/empty headings), leaving the block untouched. import/remove/set source_* also recompute.

SKILL.md:165-167 documents non-Claude runtime driving (sub-agent fan-out, orchestrator injection duty L161, permission-prompt rule L166); README.md reflects §3-16 flags/fields; skills/tp/REFERENCE.md exists; go test ./... exit 0, golangci-lint 0 issues.

All 7 rules enforced: ValidateTaskEntry (entry.go:31-74) + duplicate id (add.go:212-218) + invalid JSON (add.go:60-67). io.go:77-91 [] not null; structured.go:201-204 Tables/NumberedLists []; stats tags [] (TestStats_TagsEmptyIsArrayNotNull).

ExtractSpecExcerptForTask: source_lines first, else extractSectionsExcerpt (heading+body to next same/shallower, listed order, blank-joined, capped 2000). --compact omits spec_excerpt but keeps bookkeeping/suggested_files/budget fields (resume.go:113-123).

invalid-JSON add → exit 2 decoder in hint (add.go:64); cobra flag-parse → tp error object exit 2 (usage_error.go:27-31); dash-leading done reason → exit 2 hint naming '--' (L48-53). Every non-zero error object carries a hint.

CheckEmptySections: if end>=start → has content, skip; if next heading is deeper (headings[i+1].Level > h.Level) → container, skip (L36-38); else empty leaf → fire empty-section. lint_test.go:72-103 covers container-skip and leaf-fire.

WithFileLockTimeout loops TryLock with backoff (10ms→50ms cap) until lock_timeout_seconds; LockTimeoutError{LockPath,Elapsed} → exit 4 + hint. Default 5, range 1-60 (workflow_resolve.go:17, projectconfig.go:27 clamp).

LockFilePath → .tp/locks/<base>-<hash>.lock; stale sibling removed (L63-67); init.go:97-101 EnsureTPGitignore creates .tp/.gitignore (projectconfig.go:326 covers 'locks/'); commit.go:202-204 refuses .tasks.json.lock via --files.

max_rounds(null uncapped)/rounds_remaining/budget_exhausted (L75-86); in_flight_round from InFlightRound (L89-93); snapshot written at round start, review-round-N.ndjson at record; resume next_action=record-round N; round 1 regression skipped no-baseline (skipped.go:29).

loadMergeFindings: missing/unreadable → exit 3; malformed/incomplete skipped with stderr warning (which named); all-empty yields [] without failing. Same shape in audit_merge.go:116-165. missingFindingFields gates location/severity/finding.

--merge rejects spec-looking positional (exit 2) in review_merge.go:25-34 and audit_merge.go:29-38; --resolve takes findings NDJSON, .md → exit 2 (review_resolve.go:48-55); 0-based stated in resolveUsageForm; non-numeric index → exit 2 (L59-67).

roundTo(actualMin,1); roundedActual==0 → Accuracy nil + Note 'duration below resolution' + excluded++; summary EstimationAccuracy excludes null-accuracy tasks, ExcludedFromAccuracy counts them; Note niled under --compact (L69-73).

DeriveBookkeeping: closure (ref=task id via managedFieldsChanged), round (ref=round num from filename), config (ref=basename); [] when clean. resume.go:83-86 guidance for implement phase. Both survive --compact (resume.go:113-123, 134-136).

skipped_roles [{role,reason}] (skipped.go:26-29 reasons); attribution_excludes=['regression'] only when regression-only clusters exist (overlapReportWithAttribution:71-82); audit overlap_report clusters non-PASS by (item_id,category) (audit_overlap.go:16-38); all omitted under --compact.
